annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under 6 Del. C. § 2301(a) — 8.75% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from Delaware’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Current formula value as of 2026-07-09; verify at delcode.delaware.gov. Not legal advice.
